codex: The exact dimension claim is repairable under full-cell support and with the actual-cardinality parameter bound correctly. It is not honestly repairable in its present one-parameter form under only \(|\alpha^\star|\ge\gamma\). For \(K=2,m=3,u=2,\gamma=r=1\), \(\dim\mathcal H_1=3^2+(3-1)^2=13\), \(\dim L^2(Z_2)=3\), \(\dim\mathcal S_{1,\alpha^\star}=13+3=16\), and \(\dim\mathcal G_{\alpha^\star}=2\cdot2\cdot3=12\). With demand basis elements as rows and supply basis elements as columns, the pairing matrix is therefore \(12\times16\), and injectivity requires full row rank \(12\). The anchor’s \(12\times15\) display augments its 13-element \(\mathcal H_1\) basis by only \(\{1,Z_2\}\), omitting the third ternary direction \(Z_2^2\).
why: The kernel passed field-tier novelty with no novelty flags. Four soundness defects are repairable without changing assumptions to encode the conclusion; the one-parameter theorem must be restricted to exact cardinality or generalized to (gamma,r).
